title: brassica repanda subsp. oxyrrhina
intro: Brassica repanda subsp. oxyrrhina, also known as rocket or arugula, is a plant species belonging to the Brassicaceae family. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and exhibit antioxidant and antibacterial activities. The health benefits of consuming Brassica repanda subsp. oxyrrhina include supporting immune function, reducing the risk of certain cancers, and improving cardiovascular health. Herbal preparations of the plant include fresh leaves used in salads, infused oils, and teas, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
